title: Evangelion Phantasy Star Portable 2 Infinity merch
display_title: Evangelion Phantasy Star Portable 2 Infinity merch
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Phantasy Star Portable 2 - Infinity merch             Quote Post by arkiel » Wed Nov 10, 2010 3:53 pm From: http://www.japanator.com/gainax-invades-phantasy-star-encourages-cosplay-17250.phtml Whether you love it, hate it or feel absolute apathy, the Phantasy Star series continues to live on in the format popularized by the seminal Phantasy Star Online, released on the Dreamcast 10 years ago. While not so big in the states, the series seems to be popular enough in Japan to warrant quite a few sequels, especially in the portable realm. The latest, Phantasy Star Portable 2 - Infinity, has a couple of interesting additions if you happen to be a fan of Gainax and their giant robots, according to 4gamer. Placed into in-game shops are outfits and weapons based off of Neon Genesis Evangelion and Gurren Lagann. This includes Shinji, Rei and Mari's school outfits, several plug suits, the Lance of Longinus, a set of clothes based off the actual Gurren robot, the Gurren Boomerang and the Giga Drill. Should you desire to got your in-game cosplay on the game comes out February 24, 2011.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 10, 2010 7:56 pm I think that it was already mentioned there . I've never been a fan of Phantasy Star, yet it seems a funny addiction.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Nov 11, 2010 12:14 am How can this not be awesome?
